subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Threshold of the Blessed Beauty! Due to intense physical weakness and the dissolution of strength, owing to the change of climate in Tiberias [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده آستان جمال مبارک از شدت ضعف جسمانی و انحلال قوی بجهت تبدیل هوا بطبریا
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @consolation and comfort, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
